personal.name: ibrahim Ekinci
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.summary: Mid-to-Senior Backend Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing, developing, and deploying scalable applications and distributed microservices. Deep expertise in backend architecture, relational/NoSQL databases, and API integrations. Leverages a strong foundation in C# and transitionary experience in Golang to build resilient, high-performance systems.

experience.title: Software Developer
description: Maintained existing programs, developed applications tailored to new requirements, and rectified errors within Turkey's largest e-commerce company.
Engineered and deployed scalable backend modules utilizing Golang and Java within a highly distributed microservices architecture focused on order management.
Optimized large-scale data operations and query performance across PostgreSQL, Cassandra, and Couchbase clusters.
Collaborated with cross-functional Agile squads using Jira, employing pair programming and comprehensive testing (TDD, DDD) to ensure zero-downtime deployments.

experience.title: Software Developer
description: Architected and maintained core backend services for an enterprise CRM platform utilizing .NET Core and SignalR.
Containerized application environments using Docker to streamline local development and ensure parity across deployment pipelines.
Integrated third-party WhatsApp messaging APIs to unify real-time communication protocols, significantly improving platform data flow and database performance through PostgreSQL.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Provided dedicated IT consultancy and systems engineering for the British Petroleum (BP) Turkey office, modernizing internal business operations.
Built the 'CAB Online' customer history and change management system using .NET MVC and Oracle, streamlining data retrieval times.
Developed a digital discount card processing platform automating requests, approvals, and activations utilizing .NET MVC, Web Forms, MSSQL, and Oracle.
Participated in the project to renovate the payment infrastructure of Halil Pekdemir Ciftligi's Vehicle Management System (TYM).

experience.title: Computer Engineer (Internship)
description: Completed internship focused on C# and T-SQL development.

certifications.name: Microsoft Software and Database Proficiency (696 hours)

projects.title: Unfollowers on Instagram
projects.description: A privacy-focused, open-source Chrome extension that helps Instagram users identify who is not following them back. Operates entirely within the user's browser, eliminating the need for an API access or password.

projects.title: File Type Detector
projects.description: An open-source .NET library to accurately identify MIME types and file extensions via low-level binary signatures (magic bytes) and stream analysis.

projects.title: WhatsApp Integration (next4biz)
projects.description: Integration work carried out to enable messaging functionality with WhatsApp within the Next4biz automation system.

projects.title: Security Improvements (British Petrol)
projects.description: Implemented security enhancements for internal systems at British Petrol.

projects.title: Discount Card Online (British Petrol)
projects.description: Digitalized the discount card processes (requests, approvals, activations) migrating previously paper-based features into a secure digital environment.

projects.title: CAB Online (British Petrol)
projects.description: Developed a customer history and change management system to track operations and implement approvals via a digital environment.

projects.title: Payment Infrastructure Change (Halil Pekdemir Ciftligi)
projects.description: Integrated Asseco (Payten) for the payment infrastructure of the Vehicle Management System, enabling secure credit card storage and fast payment processing.
